name: ax_bar
description: Bar chart. Use inside ax_draw2d. Two forms: (1) string categories and numeric values, (2) just values with auto-numbered categories. Supports color, bar_width, and name options. Use bar_mode layout option for grouped or stacked multi-series charts.

name: ax_contour
signatures: ax_contour(expr, xvar, xlo, xhi, yvar, ylo, yhi)
description: Filled contour plot of a 2D expression. Use inside ax_draw2d. Samples f(x,y) on a grid and renders as a Plotly contour chart with multiple filled levels. Distinct from implicit() which renders a single contour line at zero. Supports colorscale, ncontours, and showscale options.

name: ax_draw2d
description: Draw 2D interactive plots using Plotly.js. Accepts draw package objects (explicit, parametric, points, implicit) and Aximar objects (ax_contour, ax_heatmap, ax_bar, ax_histogram). Renders as interactive charts with pan, zoom, and hover. Style options: color, line_width, dash, marker_symbol, marker_size, fill, opacity, name, colorscale, showscale, nbins, ncontours, bar_width. Layout options: title, xlabel, ylabel, xrange, yrange, grid, showlegend, aspect_ratio, width, height, bar_mode.

examples.input: ax_draw2d(color="red", explicit(x^2, x, -3, 3), color="blue", explicit(x^3, x, -2, 2))$

name: ax_draw3d
description: Draw 3D interactive plots using Plotly.js with WebGL. Accepts draw package objects (explicit for surfaces, points for 3D scatter) and renders them as rotatable, zoomable 3D charts. Style options: color, opacity, colorscale, marker_size, marker_symbol, name. Layout options: title, xlabel, ylabel, zlabel, xrange, yrange, zrange, showlegend, width, height.

examples.input: ax_draw3d(explicit(x^2 - y^2, x, -2, 2, y, -2, 2), title="Saddle", colorscale="Viridis")$

name: ax_heatmap
signatures: ax_heatmap(expr, xvar, xlo, xhi, yvar, ylo, yhi)
description: Heatmap visualization. Use inside ax_draw2d. Three forms: (1) a Maxima matrix, (2) a matrix with string axis labels, (3) a symbolic expression sampled on a grid. Renders as a Plotly heatmap with continuous color gradient. Supports colorscale and showscale options.

name: ax_histogram
description: Histogram of numeric data. Use inside ax_draw2d. Takes a flat list of numbers; Plotly handles binning automatically. Use nbins to control the number of bins. Use bar_mode="overlay" with opacity for overlaid histograms comparing distributions.

examples.input: ax_draw2d(color="blue", opacity=0.5, ax_histogram(data1), color="red", opacity=0.5, ax_histogram(data2), bar_mode="overlay")$

name: ax_plot2d
description: Plot one or more expressions as interactive Plotly.js charts. A convenience wrapper around ax_draw2d that automatically creates explicit() objects from expressions. Supports Plotly-native style options (color, dash, marker_symbol, etc.) and layout options (title, xlabel, ylabel, xrange, yrange, width, height, aspect_ratio, etc.).

name: ax_polar
description: Plot r(θ) curves in polar coordinates as interactive Plotly.js charts. Standalone function (like ax_plot2d). Samples the radial expression along the angular range and renders as a scatterpolar trace. Supports style options: color, line_width, dash, name. Layout options: title, showlegend, width, height.
